Cross sections were obtained from the charge collected,
target thickness, dead time and known solid angle.
The consistency of the current integrator was checked
for the elastic scattering data with a monitor detector
fixed at 20. degr.

thickness, solid angle, etc., result in about a 10%
uncertainty in absolute cross sections.
